chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-7881 of 2019 M. Hassan Soomro & others Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.5170/20 2. For orders as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 05.05.2025 Mr. Mushtaq Ahmed for petitioners. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioners, on instructions, does not press this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
